name: backend-launcher-contract
purpose: Electron invokes a backend launcher via a stable protocol instead of hardcoding Python venv or packaged executable paths.

backendRoot.description: Filesystem root that contains the backend runtime assets.

health.guarantee: FastAPI process is accepting requests on the configured host/port; deeper subsystem readiness is intentionally deferred to Phase 4 PR3.

spawn_failure.description: Launcher could not start the backend process at all.

early_exit.description: Backend process exited before reaching health-ready state.

health_timeout.description: Backend process started but did not satisfy the health contract before timeout.
